description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-wing school building with a modern, utilitarian design. The structure features two main blocks connected by a central corridor, with large window panels along the facades and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily light gray with brown vertical accents, and the building surrounds two large, open courtyards or play areas, one of which is bordered by a series of evenly spaced posts or columns. The main entrance appears to be set back from the street, with a wide paved area in front. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the overall layout suggests a focus on functionality and accessibility. The building is likely constructed from concrete and glass, with metal and wood elements for structural and aesthetic purposes.
description: A modern, rectangular school building with large windows, flat roofs, and two open courtyards, featuring light gray and brown exterior accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building block and a glimpse of the open courtyard area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the length of the building, the central corridor, and the two large open courtyards.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full layout, including both courtyards and the arrangement of the building wings.
description_view_3: Side elevation showing the long facade with evenly spaced windows and vertical accents.
